    AVG(fdp.years_since_death) AS avg_years_since_death, 
    COUNT(fdp.person_id) AS total_person_ids
FROM 
    fact_deceased_person_details fdp
JOIN 
    fact_deceased_occupation fdo ON fdp.deceased_id = fdo.deceased_id
JOIN 
    dim_occupation_codes dfo ON fdo.occupation_id = dfo.occupation_id
WHERE 
    fdp.marital_status_at_death_code ILIKE 'married'
GROUP BY 
    dfo.occupation_description
HAVING 
    COUNT(fdp.person_id) >= 1
ORDER BY 
    avg_years_since_death DESC;
